evals.prompt: I have Smart Label Capture working in my .NET Android app (see IntegratedActivity.cs), but cashiers complain that the expiry date doesn't always scan. I want the guided validation flow so they can see which fields were captured, type in any field that didn't scan, and confirm before the result is saved. Also make sure the keyboard doesn't cover the input.
evals.expected_output: The skill switches to the validation flow: creates LabelCaptureValidationFlowOverlay.Create(labelCapture, null) and adds it via dataCaptureView.AddOverlay, sets a Listener implementing ILabelCaptureValidationFlowListener (handling OnValidationFlowLabelCaptured on the main thread, plus empty OnManualInputSubmitted / OnValidationFlowResultUpdate), optionally applies LabelCaptureValidationFlowSettings.Create() (e.g. a placeholder for the expiry field), delegates OnResume()/OnPause() to the overlay, and sets ShouldHandleKeyboardInsetsInternally = true. Reads values from the captured fields (Barcode?.Data falling back to Text for manual entries). Preserves the label definition / camera setup.

assertions.text: LabelCaptureValidationFlowOverlay.Create(labelCapture, ...) is used to create the validation flow overlay
The overlay is attached to the DataCaptureView (via AddOverlay or by passing the view to Create)
A class implementing ILabelCaptureValidationFlowListener is provided and set as the overlay's Listener
OnValidationFlowLabelCaptured(IList<LabelField>) is implemented to receive the final confirmed fields
The optional listener methods OnManualInputSubmitted and OnValidationFlowResultUpdate are implemented (at least with empty bodies) for interface compliance
overlay.OnResume() and overlay.OnPause() are called from the activity's OnResume/OnPause (lifecycle delegation)
ShouldHandleKeyboardInsetsInternally is set to true so the keyboard does not cover the manual-entry field
Field values are read with Barcode?.Data and/or Text (acknowledging manual entries surface as Text)
The result handling does not assume a background thread (OnValidationFlowLabelCaptured runs on the main thread)
The existing label definition and camera/context setup are preserved
Deprecated validation-flow settings (MissingFieldsHintText, RequiredFieldErrorText, ManualInputButtonText) are NOT introduced
